title: phalaris humilis
intro: Phalaris humilis, also known as canary grass or sweet canary grass, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Phalaris humilis include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Phalaris humilis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
